name: nooxus-mcp
description: MCP server for supply chain entity search - find Chinese manufacturers by production capability
author: GloolsGuan <gloolsguan@gmail.com>

tools.name: search_manufacturing_entities
tools.description: Search for manufacturing entities (NOO - Nous Nodes) with specific production capabilities. Returns structured company data optimized for LLM consumption.

capability.description: Production capability to search for (e.g., 'precision casting', 'CNC machining')

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
